violations.text: Milk jug with hot chocolate mix was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Creamer and cheese was observed held at 45-52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved creamer and cheese to walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Inspector observed ambient thermometer in poor repair in mini-fridge unit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front lobby, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Inspector observed mini fridge ambient temperatures between 48-64. PIC adjusted temperatures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Facility is lacking a way to air dry dishes. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the mini fridge units and microwave have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Inspector observed broken tile in kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025
Boxes of pastries were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023

The floors in the coffee prep area especially under refrigerators have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
